summary: Made two surgical continuity edits: one at the opening to carry the immediate sleepless aftermath of Chapter 14 into Lena's evidence-sorting scene, and one at the exit to set up the bank-statement confrontation that opens Chapter 16. The opening construction already differed from the visible next-chapter opening, so no structural opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Added a brief sleepless-aftermath line under the opening sentence to tighten the handoff from the Chapter 14 discovery.
Added a final bank-statement preparation line to bridge Lena's walk home to the Chapter 16 doorstep confrontation.
